properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who am I? Where did I come from? What am I doing here? Where am I going? I never knew, but now I know.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’ve always wondered what is this skin that I call me, I felt confined and I wanted to be free, so free, There is a me that’s looking through my eyes, moving to be reunited with /: my theophany I bypassed. :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I’m being known as I was always known Not a partial realization, a perfect one, I’m being transformed the word is who I am, The perfect one is come and I now see Him, face to face, face to face.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I felt caged like a bird, No way of escape, When I want to do good, Evil was ever present with me, but I delight in the law of God with my new nature, It’s through Jesus Christ, our victory has been won, Power to overcome, It’s been won.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I’m becoming love that’s how I know I am perfected And love with faith will master all circumstances, Ascending into a higher order, a higher life, Living in the knowledge of a pre-planned life.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: When He ascended on high, He led captivity captive, gave gifts unto men to perfect His bride, till we all stand in stature of a perfect man till we all Stand in the fullness of Jesus Christ.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I’m being known as I was always known, Not a partial realization, a perfect one, I’m being transformed the word is who I am, The perfect one is come, and I now see Him Face to face, I know who I am face to face, see Him as he is Face to face.
